title: What's Next for the Super Bowl?
description: What’s in store for the future of the Super Bowl? Randall Williams dives into what the league is looking for from cities that want to host the big game in the years to come. (Source: Bloomberg)
content: What’s in store for the future of the Super Bowl? Randall Williams dives into what the league is looking for from cities that want to host the big game in the years to come. (Source: Bloomberg)
